simple_types.name: Socket_Type
simple_types.code:
type Socket_Type is (
   Pair,
   Pub,
   Sub,
   Req,
   Rep,
   Dealer,
   Router,
   Pull,
   …,
   Stream
);

tagged_types.name: Socket
tagged_types.code: type Socket is new Ada.Finalization.Limited_Controlled with private;

subprograms.name: Bind
subprograms.code: procedure Bind (Self : in out Socket; Endpoint : String)

subprograms.name: Close
subprograms.code: procedure Close (Self : in out Socket)

documentation.description:
Close is idempotent: no-op if socket is already closed.
After Close, the socket may be re-opened with any Open_* procedure.

subprograms.name: Connect
subprograms.code: procedure Connect (Self : in out Socket; Endpoint : String)

subprograms.name: Disconnect
subprograms.code: procedure Disconnect (Self : in out Socket; Endpoint : String)

subprograms.name: Get_Handle
subprograms.code: function Get_Handle (Self : Socket) return System.Address

subprograms.name: Is_Valid
subprograms.code: function Is_Valid (Self : Socket) return Boolean

subprograms.name: New_Dealer
subprograms.code: function New_Dealer (Endpoint : String := "") return Socket

subprograms.name: New_Pub
subprograms.code: function New_Pub (Endpoint : String := "") return Socket

subprograms.name: New_Pull
subprograms.code: function New_Pull (Endpoint : String := "") return Socket

subprograms.name: New_Push
subprograms.code: function New_Push (Endpoint : String := "") return Socket

subprograms.name: New_Rep
subprograms.code: function New_Rep (Endpoint : String := "") return Socket

subprograms.name: New_Req
subprograms.code: function New_Req (Endpoint : String := "") return Socket

subprograms.name: New_Router
subprograms.code: function New_Router (Endpoint : String := "") return Socket

subprograms.name: New_Socket
subprograms.code: function New_Socket (Kind : Socket_Type) return Socket

subprograms.name: New_Sub
subprograms.code: function New_Sub (Endpoint : String := ""; Subscribe : String := "") return Socket

subprograms.name: Open
subprograms.code: procedure Open (Self : in out Socket; Kind : Socket_Type)

documentation.description:
Close is idempotent: no-op if socket is already closed.
After Close, the socket may be re-opened with any Open_* procedure.
